sections.summary:
Aspiring Full Stack and AI Developer with a strong foundation in Python, web technologies, and Azure AI services.
Experienced in building real-world applications such as a Sign Language Recognition System and an Online
Laundry Service. Skilled in AI-driven workflows, REST APIs, and modern frontend frameworks.
